key.name: panel-label-mode
key.summary: Which metric to show in the panel (deprecated)
key.description: Deprecated in favor of panel-items; kept for migration. Options: min, claude-session, claude-weekly, codex-session, codex-weekly

key.name: panel-items
key.summary: Metrics shown in the panel, in order
key.description: Any of: min, claude-session, claude-weekly, codex-session, codex-weekly. An empty list shows a placeholder.

key.name: panel-show-labels
key.summary: Prefix panel metrics with short labels
key.description: When more than one metric is shown, prefix each value with a short label (e.g. "C 60% · X 73%"). A single metric is always unlabeled.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.summary: Show a notification when usage drops below the threshold

key.name: notify-threshold-pct
key.summary: Remaining-usage percentage that triggers a notification
